creator: voisined@wit.edu
text:
Update to version 2.6

New Features: http://www.aprelium.com/news/abws26.html

Also updated pkg-descr to remove features not present in the FreeBSD version.

Fix: Apply patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/abyssws/ && make install clean
